title: CIRCULAR FoodPack: Summary of Results (Final Event 28.11.2024)
author: Bavarian Research Alliance
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Presentation of the project results of the European Project CIRCULAR FoodPack. 
 Between 2021 and 2024, the CIRCULAR FoodPack consortium has worked on designing circularity for flexible packaging, demonstrated the technical realisation of the various steps required to obtain Post-Consumer Recyclates, and how to integrate the PCR in new packaging meeting the high standards for food protection and safety. On November 28 2024 the final Event took place in Brussels, presenting the project results. Find out more about the project's key learnings and the challenges of making flexible packaging circular. 
 
 Project Introduction 
 Collection & Sorting 
 Advance Mechanical Recycling 
 Safety & Compliance 
 Design for Circularity 
 Economical Market Aspects 
 
   
 Note: This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No. 101003806.
